name: pwd
desc: Print the current working directory. -P resolves symlinks to the physical path.

name: ls
desc: List directory contents. -a shows dotfiles, -l long format, -h human sizes, -R recursive, -t/-S sort by mtime/size.

name: cd
desc: Change directory. No arg goes home; - goes to the previous directory; .. goes up one level.

name: tree
desc: Recursive directory listing. -L limits depth, -a includes hidden files, -d only directories, -h human sizes.

name: mkdir
desc: Create a directory. -p makes intermediate directories and ignores existing ones.

name: touch
desc: Create an empty file, or update its modification time. -a updates only the access time.

name: cat
desc: Print one or more files to stdout. Multiple files are concatenated in order.

name: less
desc: Pager: scroll, search with /word, follow with +F. Quit with q. Better than `more` for most needs.

name: more
desc: Page-by-page viewer. Older and simpler than less; usually prefer less.

name: head
desc: Print the first N lines of a file (default 10).

name: tail
desc: Print the last N lines. -f follows the file as it grows - useful for logs.

name: cp
desc: Copy files or directories. -r recursive; -p preserves mode/mtime/owner; -i prompts before overwrite.

name: mv
desc: Move or rename a file or directory. -i prompts before overwriting an existing destination.

name: rm
desc: Delete files. -r recurses into directories, -f forces (no prompts), -i prompts before each delete.

name: ln -s
desc: Create a symbolic link pointing to target.

name: chmod
desc: Change file permissions. Octal: 644 = rw-r--r--, 755 = rwxr-xr-x. Symbolic: +x, u+w, g-r, a-w.

name: chown
desc: Change file owner and optionally group. -R recurses.

name: sudo
desc: Run a command as another user (default root). `sudo su` becomes root shell; `sudo visudo` edits the sudoers file safely.

name: file
desc: Guess the type of a file by inspecting its bytes.

name: df
desc: Show disk-space usage per filesystem. -h human-readable, -T includes filesystem type, -i shows inode usage.

name: gzip / gunzip
desc: Compress or decompress .gz files. -k keeps the original (otherwise it is removed).

name: zcat
desc: Print a gzip-compressed file to stdout without decompressing it on disk.

name: tar
desc: Create (-c), extract (-x), or list (-t) archives. -z adds gzip, -v is verbose, -f names the archive.

name: redirect
syntax: cmd > file  |  cmd >> file  |  cmd 2> err  |  cmd &> all
desc: Redirect output streams. > overwrites stdout, >> appends, 2> sends stderr, &> sends both.

name: pipe
desc: Send stdout of one command as stdin of the next. Chain as many as you like.

name: wc
desc: Count lines (-l), words (-w), bytes (-c), or longest-line length (-L).

name: grep
desc: Print lines matching a pattern. -i ignore case, -v invert, -r recurse, -n line numbers, -E extended regex, -w whole word.

name: sort
desc: Sort lines. -r reverse, -n numeric, -u unique, -t/-k for column-aware sorts.

name: uniq
desc: Drop consecutive duplicate lines - usually after sort. -c prefixes counts.

name: cut
desc: Pick columns by delimiter (-f) or by character position (-c).

name: tr
desc: Translate characters. -d deletes a set; -s squeezes repeats into one.

name: sed
desc: Stream editor. g replaces all per line; -i edits in place; A,Bp prints a range; Nd deletes line N.

name: awk
desc: Per-line mini-language. Fields are $1..$N; NR is line number. Use END {} for summaries.

name: xargs
desc: Turn stdin lines into arguments to a command. -n controls how many per call.

name: find
desc: Recursively search the filesystem by name, type, size, mtime, etc.

name: locate
desc: Fast filename search against a prebuilt index. `updatedb` refreshes it.

name: echo
desc: Print arguments to stdout. -e enables backslash escapes. Double quotes expand $VAR and $(...); single quotes don't.

name: history
desc: Show shell history. !! repeats last command; !grep repeats most recent grep; !42 repeats line 42.

name: alias
desc: Define a shortcut for a command. Add to ~/.bashrc to persist.

name: source
desc: Run a script in the current shell so its variables and functions persist.

name: whoami
desc: Print the current effective user name.

name: which
desc: Print the full path of an executable in $PATH.

name: type
desc: Tell whether a name is a shell builtin, alias, function, or external file.

name: man
desc: Open the manual page for a command. -k searches summaries by keyword.

name: ps
desc: Show running processes. `ps aux` is the classic full-system view.

name: top
desc: Live process monitor: CPU, memory, uptime. Press q to quit.

name: kill
desc: Send a signal to a process. Default is SIGTERM (graceful). -9 is SIGKILL (force).

name: comm
desc: Compare two sorted files. Three columns: only A, only B, in both. Suppress columns with -1/-2/-3.

name: ssh
desc: Open a secure shell on a remote host. -i picks an explicit private key.

name: wget
desc: Download files over HTTP(S). -c resumes a partial download, -r recurses, --limit-rate caps bandwidth.

name: curl
desc: HTTP client. -f fails on errors, -s silent, -S show errors anyway, -L follow redirects, -o write to file.

name: Ctrl-C
desc: Send SIGINT to the foreground process - interrupt and stop it.

name: Ctrl-Z
desc: Suspend the foreground job. Resume with fg (foreground) or bg (background).

name: Ctrl-R
desc: Reverse incremental search of shell history. Type to filter, Enter to run, Ctrl-R again for older matches.

name: Tab
desc: Autocomplete commands, file names, and arguments. Press twice to list possible completions.

name: git init
desc: Initialize a new git repository in the current directory (or in dir).

name: git clone
desc: Copy a remote repo to your machine.

name: git status
desc: Show what's changed since the last commit. -s for short form.

name: git add
syntax: git add <path>  |  git add .  |  git add -p
desc: Stage changes for the next commit. -p stages hunks interactively.

name: git commit
syntax: git commit -m "<msg>"  |  git commit -am "<msg>"  |  git commit --amend
desc: Record staged changes. -a auto-stages modified files; --amend rewrites the last commit.

name: git log
desc: Show commit history. --oneline + --graph + --all is the classic overview.

name: git diff
syntax: git diff  |  git diff --staged  |  git diff <a>..<b>
desc: Show changes. No args = unstaged. --staged = what's staged. a..b = between revisions.

name: git show
desc: Show a commit (message + diff) or a single file at a given revision.

name: git blame
desc: Show which commit and author last touched each line.

name: git restore
desc: Discard unstaged changes. With --staged, unstage but keep working tree changes.

name: git reset
desc: Move HEAD to <rev>. Default keeps working tree. --hard wipes uncommitted changes. Destructive.

name: git revert
desc: Create a new commit that undoes <rev>. Safe in shared branches.

name: git branch
syntax: git branch [-a]  |  git branch <name>  |  git branch -d <name>
desc: List, create, or delete branches. -a lists remotes too.

name: git switch
desc: Move between branches. -c creates a new branch first.

name: git merge
desc: Merge another branch into the current one. --abort bails out of a conflicted merge.

name: git rebase
desc: Replay commits on top of another base. -i lets you reorder, squash, or edit.

name: git fetch
desc: Download remote refs without merging. --prune drops branches deleted on the remote.

name: git pull
desc: Fetch and merge upstream into the current branch. --rebase replays your commits on top.

name: git push
desc: Send commits to a remote. -u sets upstream so future pushes don't need args.

name: git stash
syntax: git stash  |  git stash pop  |  git stash list
desc: Set aside uncommitted changes. pop restores them and drops the stash.
example: git stash; git pull --rebase; git stash pop

name: git tag
desc: Mark a commit. -a creates an annotated tag with metadata.

name: git reflog
desc: History of everywhere HEAD has pointed. Use it to recover commits you thought were lost.

name: git cherry-pick
desc: Apply a single commit from elsewhere onto the current branch.

name: git config
desc: Set git options. --global puts them in ~/.gitconfig.

name: samtools view
desc: Print alignments from a SAM/BAM file. -b outputs BAM.

name: samtools sort
desc: Coordinate-sort a BAM file (required for indexing).

name: samtools index
desc: Build a .bai index for a coordinate-sorted BAM.

name: samtools flagstat
desc: Summary stats: total reads, mapped, properly paired, duplicates.

name: bcftools view
desc: Print variants from a VCF/BCF file.

name: bcftools stats
desc: Per-sample variant statistics.

name: bedtools intersect
desc: Find intervals in A overlapping any in B.

name: bedtools merge
desc: Merge overlapping or adjacent intervals.

name: seqkit stats
desc: Summary stats for FASTA/FASTQ: counts, length distribution, N50.

name: seqkit grep
desc: Extract sequences by ID. -r treats -p as a regex.

name: seqkit seq
desc: Filter/transform sequences. -m/-M filter by length, -r reverse-complement.
